# EA Sentinel

> Real-time uptime, drawdown and disconnect alerts for your MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisors — straight to Telegram.

EA Sentinel is online at https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/.

## Key pages
- [EA Sentinel](https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/): EA Sentinel page
- [Privacy](https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/privacy): Privacy page
- [Terms](https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/terms): Terms page

## FAQ
### What is EA Sentinel?
Real-time uptime, drawdown and disconnect alerts for your MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisors — straight to Telegram.

### Where can I find EA Sentinel?
EA Sentinel is available at https://mt5monitor.alastor.space/.

### Page text

EA Sentinel
 
 
 How it works 
 Features 
 Pricing 
 
 Start monitoring 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 For traders running EAs 24/7 on a VPS
 
 
 Know the second your MT5 EA stops trading.
 
 
 Real-time uptime, drawdown and disconnect alerts for your MetaTrader 5 Expert Advisors —
 straight to Telegram. Stop finding out hours later that your bot went down, blew a
 drawdown limit, or lost the broker connection.
 
 
 Start monitoring → 
 See how it works 
 
 No card to start · Telegram alerts in under 5 minutes 
 
 

 
 
 Your EA went down at 2 a.m. You found out at noon. 
 A detached EA, a frozen terminal, a broker disconnect, a VPS reboot — any of them silently stops your strategy. By the time you notice, you've missed entries, held losers, or breached a funded-account rule. 
 
 EA detached / stopped AutoTrading off, EA removed from chart, or terminal closed — and no one told you. 
 Broker disconnect Connection drops at the worst moment; orders don't fire, trailing stops freeze. 
 Drawdown breach Equity falls past your limit — or your prop-firm daily limit — with no warning. 
 
 

 
 
 
 Live in 5 minutes 
 
 01 Attach the monitor Drop the lightweight EA Sentinel utility on any chart (or connect read-only). It sends a secure heartbeat with your account health. 
 02 Set your rules Pick the thresholds that matter — max drawdown, margin level, “no trades in X hours”, disconnect, equity floor. 
 03 Get pinged instantly The moment something breaks, you get a Telegram / email / SMS alert — with exactly what failed and on which account. 
 
 
 

 
 
 Everything you need to sleep through the session 
 
 ⚡ Instant downtime alerts EA stopped, AutoTrading off, terminal closed, or VPS offline — detected within seconds. 
 📉 Drawdown & margin guards Alert before you breach a personal or prop-firm drawdown / daily-loss limit. 
 🔌 Broker disconnect watch Know the instant the terminal loses its connection to your broker. 
 🧊 “Frozen EA” detection No ticks processed or no trades when there should be? Catch a silently-stuck strategy. 
 🖥️ Multi-account fleet view Every account, VPS and EA on one live dashboard — equity, DD, open trades, status. 
 📲 Telegram · Email · SMS Route alerts where you'll actually see them, with per-rule channels. 
 
 

 
 
 
 Simple pricing 
 Cancel anytime. Less than one missed trade. 
 
 
 
 Solo 
 $9 /mo 
 
 ✓ 1 account ✓ Telegram + email alerts ✓ Uptime & disconnect alerts ✓ 7-day history 
 
 Subscribe 
 
 
 
 MOST POPULAR 
 Trader 
 $19 /mo 
 
 ✓ Up to 5 accounts ✓ Telegram + email + SMS ✓ Drawdown & margin rules ✓ Frozen-EA detection ✓ 90-day history 
 
 Subscribe 
 
 
 
 Desk 
 $49 /mo 
 
 ✓ Unlimited accounts ✓ Multi-VPS fleet dashboard ✓ All alert channels ✓ Priority support ✓ 1-year history 
 
 Subscribe 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 Questions 
 
 Does it place or close trades? No. EA Sentinel is monitoring-only — it watches your accounts and alerts you. It never trades. 
 Which brokers / platforms? Any broker on MetaTrader 5. MT4 support is on the roadmap. 
 Will it work on my VPS? Yes — the monitor runs alongside your terminal on any Windows VPS, and a cloud option needs no install. 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 Get early access — plan 
 We're onboarding our first traders now. Drop your email and we'll send your invite + a launch discount. 
 
 
 
 Get my invite 
 
 Maybe later 
 
 
 
 
 ✅ 
 You're on the list. 
 We'll email your invite shortly. Watch your inbox. 
 Close
